The relevant paragraph is: "There are things to remember when communication with pen pals, especially in the digital age: Make sure to share all letters and e-mails with your parents so they know you are safe. Meeting with a classmate rather than a grown-up would not meet this requirement, so option B is incorrect. The text emphasizes safety (e.g., sharing with parents, stopping if something seems wrong), so option C is a reasonable interpretation of the guidance given.
